title: MEDIEVAL CRAFT (weapons)
description: Medieval Craft adds 3D weapons, armor, mobs and structures.
body:
![medievalCraft](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/669753/description_a489783b-8cb3-4c41-85fa-165ed29e14d6.png)

This Mod contains only the weapons and armor from medieval craft click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/medieval-craft-(structures)) to download the Medieval Craft (structures) .

Is highly recomended to use version 1.16.5 for this mod, since its the one with most features and less bugs.

The 1.16.5 version of this mod is compatible with Epic Fight Mod

1.19.2 is not yet compatible.

Adds a realistic way to forge 3D medieval weapons.

This mod adds 56 3D medieval weapons
![Shields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3c2KVWQ6/images/683847dec83004c4fa1eb6a64a5222ce539a82e1.png)
![Classical Period Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3c2KVWQ6/images/760168b9be7db97594db9064d125c8d61b2108c0.png)
![Medieval Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3c2KVWQ6/images/bc84415a4fa2f3709b26348396669138195fb966.png)
![Modern Period Weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3c2KVWQ6/images/8e9cf76a394a453f497075550fbcf35db0a3c5d6.png)

![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/760c42e16787a7361a48057ed34d4246fa84324f.png)

If you want a server, BisectHosting after purchase is already configured and ready to play.

25% discount on the first month if you use the code: Medievalcraft

[https://www.bisecthosting.com/Medievalcraft](https://www.bisecthosting.com/Medievalcraft)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VTnHwmyP3-8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

How to create your sword:

Put iron ores in the first slow in a project bench, select a sword. Grab your iron bar and place in a blast furnace. The bar will be red hot, put your bar on top of a anvil and right click repeatedly with a Hammer. When the hot blade is dropped you must right click with the blade on watter. Now you must put your Blade, Guard, and a stick in a crafting table.

Common questions:

Can you add a config for the mod? I am not a programmer and I used mcreator to make this mod and it does not allow me to create one . Can I use this mod on my modpack? yes.

Can I use this mod in a video on youtube? yes but you have to put a link to this page.

Can I use textures to create another mod or texture pack? ask me before
